/usr/bin/clang++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libVanPlugin.so -o ../libVanPlugin.so CMakeFiles/VanPlugin.dir/VanPlugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VanPlugin.dir/Van.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VanPlugin.dir/VanPlugin.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/baks/code/Lab5_PluginsFunctionality/build ../../libVehicleLib.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
